mapper.insert: insert into borrow(book_name, book_no, user_id, user_name, user_phone, number1, number2, status, days, return_date) values( #{bookName}, #{bookNo} ,#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{number1}, #{number2}, #{status}, #{days}, #{returnDate})
mapper.update: update borrow set book_name = #{bookName}, book_no = #{bookNo}, user_id = #{userId} ,user_name = #{userName} ,user_phone = #{userPhone} ,number1 = #{number1}, number2 = #{number2}, status = #{status}, days = #{days}, return_date = #{returnDate}, updatetime = #{updatetime} where id = #{id}
update borrow set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from borrow order by id desc

select * from borrow
book_name like concat('%', #{ bookName },'%')
and book_no like concat('%', #{ bookNo },'%')
and user_name like concat('%', #{ userName },'%')
order by id desc

select * from ret
book_name like concat('%', #{ bookName },'%')
and book_no like concat('%', #{ bookNo },'%')
and user_name like concat('%', #{ userName },'%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into ret(book_name, book_no, user_id, user_name, user_phone, number1, number2, status, days, return_date, real_date) values( #{bookName}, #{bookNo} ,#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{number1}, #{number2}, #{status}, #{days}, #{returnDate}, #{realDate})
mapper.select:
select count(id) as count, DATE_FORMAT(createtime,'%Y-%m-%d') as date from
borrow
ret
where
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 WEEK)
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 2 MONTH)
createtime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
createtime > now()
group by date
